MartialAttackFumbles.Title: Martial Consequences: Martial Attack Fumbles
MartialAttackFumbles.Description: Critical fumbles for non-spell weapon attacks. This pack focuses on lost footing, broken rhythm, exposed defenses, and tactical displacement rather than damage-type-specific injuries.

RangedMishaps.Title: Martial Consequences: Ranged Mishaps
RangedMishaps.Description: Critical fumbles unique to non-spell ranged weapon attacks. This pack focuses on sightlines, firing positions, cover, range, and shot rhythm rather than general martial errors or damage-type-specific injuries.

MartialAttackFumbles.Name: Enable Martial Attack Fumbles
MartialAttackFumbles.Hint: Adds general martial critical-fumble cards for non-spell weapon attacks. These cards affect the attacker's stance, timing, positioning, and combat rhythm.

RangedMishaps.Name: Enable Ranged Mishaps
RangedMishaps.Hint: Adds critical-fumble cards unique to non-spell ranged weapon attacks, including lost sightlines, exposed positions, disrupted shot rhythm, and range mistakes.

Notifications.RegistrationFailed: PF2E Critical Forge: Martial Consequences could not register its card packs.

LostFooting.Title: Lost Footing
LostFooting.Description: Your footing slips as you recover. The first square you enter before the end of your next turn costs 5 additional feet of movement.

OverextendedSwing.Title: Overextended Swing
OverextendedSwing.Description: Your attack carries you too far. The target may immediately Step as a free action.

BrokenGuard.Title: Broken Guard
BrokenGuard.Description: Your weapon finishes wide. The next attack made against you before the start of your next turn gains a +1 circumstance bonus.

SlipperyGrip.Title: Slippery Grip
SlipperyGrip.Description: Your grip shifts unexpectedly. The next Strike you make with the same weapon or unarmed attack before the end of your next turn must be either your first action or your last action of that turn.

LostRhythm.Title: Lost Rhythm
LostRhythm.Description: The failed strike disrupts your combat rhythm. You cannot use reactions until the start of your next turn.

WildFollowThrough.Title: Wild Follow-Through
WildFollowThrough.Description: The target may immediately Step directly away from you. If it does and you can enter a square it vacated, you must Step into one such square.

Hesitation.Title: Hesitation
Hesitation.Description: You second-guess your next move. The first Strike you make before the end of your next turn takes a -1 circumstance penalty.

DistractedRecovery.Title: Distracted Recovery
DistractedRecovery.Description: Recovering from the miss steals your attention from the battlefield. The target may immediately attempt to Feint against you as a free action.

DefensiveCollapse.Title: Defensive Collapse
DefensiveCollapse.Description: Your failed attack leaves your defense open at close range. Until the start of your next turn, the target may move through your space without attempting to Tumble Through, treating your space as difficult terrain.

UnsteadyRecovery.Title: Unsteady Recovery
UnsteadyRecovery.Description: It takes longer than expected to regain your footing. The first move action you use before the end of your next turn must end farther from the target than you began, if possible.

TwistedStance.Title: Twisted Stance
TwistedStance.Description: Your body turns awkwardly after the miss. You cannot Step until the end of your next turn.

WeightOnTheWrongFoot.Title: Weight on the Wrong Foot
WeightOnTheWrongFoot.Description: You settle your weight badly. You take a -1 circumstance penalty to Reflex saves for 1 round.

LateRecovery.Title: Late Recovery
LateRecovery.Description: Your attack recovers too slowly. Before you can Strike again this turn, you must spend one action to recover your stance. This restriction ends at the start of your next turn.

TempoBroken.Title: Tempo Broken
TempoBroken.Description: Your attack sequence falls apart. Treat the next Strike you make before the end of your next turn as though you had already made one additional attack that turn for the purpose of your multiple attack penalty.

ForcedReset.Title: Forced Reset
ForcedReset.Description: You must rebuild your stance from the ground up. You are clumsy 1 for 1 round. You may spend a single action to steady yourself and remove this effect early.

OpenLane.Title: Open Lane
OpenLane.Description: Your miss opens a route past you. The target may immediately Stride up to 10 feet as a free action. This movement does not trigger reactions from you.

DrivenAside.Title: Driven Aside
DrivenAside.Description: The target controls your recovery. If possible, it chooses a safe, unoccupied space adjacent to you, and you Step into that space.

LostGround.Title: Lost Ground
LostGround.Description: You surrender ground to regain your balance. If possible, Step 5 feet directly away from the target.

CrowdedPosition.Title: Crowded Position
CrowdedPosition.Description: Your recovery crowds your allies' fighting space. Until the start of your next turn, you take a -1 circumstance penalty to attack rolls while adjacent to an ally.

WeaponOutOfLine.Title: Weapon Out of Line
WeaponOutOfLine.Description: Your attack leaves the weapon far outside its fighting line. The next Strike you make with the same weapon or unarmed attack before the end of your next turn takes a -2 circumstance penalty. A different weapon or unarmed attack is unaffected.

AwkwardRegrip.Title: Awkward Regrip
AwkwardRegrip.Description: Your quick weapon slips into an awkward grip. The next Strike you make with the same weapon or unarmed attack before the end of your next turn that is subject to a multiple attack penalty does not benefit from the agile trait. A Strike made with no multiple attack penalty does not consume this effect.

GuardTooHigh.Title: Guard Too High
GuardTooHigh.Description: Your guard rises too far and leaves your balance exposed. You take a -1 circumstance penalty to your Reflex DC for 1 round. This affects actions such as Trip and Tumble Through.

GuardTooLow.Title: Guard Too Low
GuardTooLow.Description: Your weapon drops below the line needed to answer an incoming attack. Until the start of your next turn, you cannot use reactions that require you to make a melee Strike.

EyesOnTheWeapon.Title: Eyes on the Weapon
EyesOnTheWeapon.Description: You watch your own weapon instead of the battlefield. You take a -1 circumstance penalty to Perception and Perception DC for 1 round.

TunnelVision.Title: Tunnel Vision
TunnelVision.Description: You focus so completely on the target that the rest of the battlefield disappears. Until the start of your next turn, you are off-guard to attacks made by creatures other than the target.

MissedThreat.Title: Missed Threat
MissedThreat.Description: Your failed attack hides another threat from view. Before the start of your next turn, the next creature other than the target that moves within or leaves your reach does not trigger reactions from you.

FalseOpening.Title: False Opening
FalseOpening.Description: You commit to an opening that was never there. Until the end of your next turn, the target gains a one-use reaction: after you complete an attack against it, the target Steps.

ExposedFlank.Title: Exposed Flank
ExposedFlank.Description: Your miss leaves one side completely open. The target chooses one square adjacent to you. Until the start of your next turn, you cannot enter that square or use reactions triggered by movement into or out of it.

ReactionBait.Title: Reaction Bait
ReactionBait.Description: Your recovery practically invites a counter. Until the start of your next turn, the target gains one additional reaction that it can use only when one of your actions satisfies the reaction's normal trigger and requirements. If the target has no eligible reaction, it may instead use this reaction to Step after you complete a move action.

GuardedTheWrongSide.Title: Guarded the Wrong Side
GuardedTheWrongSide.Description: You guard the wrong side of the engagement. Until the start of your next turn, you do not count as threatening any space for the purpose of helping an ally flank a creature.

LostSightline.Title: Lost Sightline
LostSightline.Description: You lose the target behind movement, cover, or your own weapon arm. The target gains lesser cover against your next ranged attack before the end of your next turn. This benefit ends if you first move to a different space or spend a single action to re-establish your sightline.

RevealingShot.Title: Revealing Shot
RevealingShot.Description: The failed shot reveals your exact firing position. Until the start of your next turn, you cannot be hidden or undetected from the target. Concealment still applies normally.

AwkwardRelease.Title: Awkward Release
AwkwardRelease.Description: The projectile leaves at the wrong moment. Your next ranged attack before the end of your next turn must originate from a different space or take a -1 circumstance penalty.

BrokenFiringRhythm.Title: Broken Firing Rhythm
BrokenFiringRhythm.Description: The failed shot breaks your firing rhythm. Until the start of your next turn, you cannot use reactions that require or include a ranged Strike.

ForcedReposition.Title: Forced Reposition
ForcedReposition.Description: Your current firing position no longer feels usable. Before you can make another ranged attack against the same target before the end of your next turn, you must move to a different space.

TargetFindsCover.Title: Target Finds Cover
TargetFindsCover.Description: The miss makes the danger angle obvious. The target may immediately Step as a free action. If possible, it must end that Step closer to cover from you.

PoorFollowThrough.Title: Poor Follow-Through
PoorFollowThrough.Description: Your weapon or throwing arm finishes outside the line needed for another shot. The next action you use before the end of your next turn cannot require or include a ranged Strike.

ObstructedArc.Title: Obstructed Arc
ObstructedArc.Description: The errant projectile forces someone in its path to shift. One creature between you and the target may immediately Step as a free action.

ExposedToReturnFire.Title: Exposed to Return Fire
ExposedToReturnFire.Description: Trying to save the shot pulls you out of your protected firing posture. Against the next ranged attack made against you before the start of your next turn, reduce the cover granted by your current space by one degree. Moving to a different space ends this effect.

MisjudgedDistance.Title: Misjudged Distance
MisjudgedDistance.Description: You misread the distance, movement, or projectile path. For your next ranged Strike before the end of your next turn, treat the target as one range increment farther away when determining the range penalty. You may spend a single action to gauge the distance and end this effect.
